ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., SLM, MEG, LYN) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "historical_price_data" TEXT /* Historical price data of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the performance record */,
  "initial_entry_price" REAL /* Initial entry price of the stock */,
  "highest_point" REAL /* Highest point of the stock */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the stock from initial entry */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) of the stock */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio (P/E) of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price alert, volume alert) */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price exceeds $10) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to display when the alert is triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication of the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the social media post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date of the social media post */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags of the social media post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Likes of the social media post */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the social media post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that holds the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the holding */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the holding */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock in the holding */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Purchase date of the stock in the holding */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Sale date of the stock in the holding */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the holding (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
